content.en:
Moving forward slowly, Ye Tian finally crossed this gray mountain range after sacrificing many replica bodies

At this moment, Ye Tian saw a misty area.

Looking at this misty area, Ye Tian suddenly frowned.

It seems to be a misty corridor, at least the atmosphere is a bit like that.

So, Ye Tian let a replica body fly directly in.

Soon, Ye Tian could be sure that this lackluster mist area was the mist corridor, which was the same place as the misty corridor where the Black Saint Mountain was located.

"The Black Sacred Mountain was founded by the Eternal Master, and here it is, all related to the Eternal Master, and both have fog corridors. "

Ye Tian felt that this was not a coincidence.

The misty corridor is obviously a special space-time area, which is not simple, and even once the peak Legendary Realm lord enters, he can't get out, and there are many "four seven zeros" @ doppelgangers who enter it, and they can't even meet.

With such a strange power, I am afraid that only the eternal masters know its origin very well, and perhaps the white-bearded old man also knows it.

Of course, he didn't ask the white-bearded old man. he couldn't have asked the white-bearded old man for the slightest doubt, and he didn't have to tell him everything.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned, and once he entered the misty area, he couldn't get out.

Moreover, he didn't need to explore the misty area here, if he really wanted to explore, he could go to the Black Sacred Mountain.

After the Gray Mountains, there are no roads, and the Gray Mountains don't seem to have many chances.

Could it be that this trip to the Boundary is here?

Ye Tian was a little unwilling to leave, after all, it was not easy to look here.

So, Ye Tian was waiting slowly here in the Gray Mountain Range, maybe there would be some chance here

After a while.

The border lord asked Ye Tian about the Origin Realm, and asked how Ye Tian's clone was?

Ye Tian didn't hide it, and said directly: "Border Lord, my doppelganger was lucky enough to pass through the Gray Mountain Range, but I saw a familiar place. "

"Familiar place?"

The Frontier Lord was puzzled.

Ye Tian continued: "Misty Corridor!"

"What, you saw the Misty Corridor behind the Grey Mountains?" the Frontier Lord was shocked.

"Yes!"

He nodded slightly.

The Frontier Lord was silent and pondered for a long time

Nian Ran.

The Frontier Lord said, "Endless Lord, I have a guess that the Misty Corridor is boundless, and I often see some special visions, and even pictures of strong people fighting, and those images have not happened in the Void Region. Do you think it's possible that there is a world like the Void Zone, and between heaven and earth is a place like the Fog Corridor, and it is difficult to go to another world, because we can't cross the Fog Corridor. However, the Eternal Master, however, can transcend the Misty Zone. We don't know exactly how many Eternal Masters there are in our Void Region, but Eternal Masters rarely appear, so why don't Eternal Masters stay in our timeline? Maybe they just went to other worlds similar to Void Regions. "

Ye Tian asked, "Border Lord, this is not the speculation you have come up with now, but you have had such a speculation for a long time, right?"

The border leader said with a smile: "Yes, there are many peak legendary realm lords I know, and many peak legendary realm lords are also very curious about this, and they will even speculate whether there are other worlds outside the void area, and after chatting a lot, there are all kinds of speculations, and the guess I said is the most likely speculation." "

"The Eternal Controller does not reveal this secret, perhaps because he is afraid that the Peak Legendary Realm Lords will seek death and try to go to another world, resulting in the fall and death. "

"For example, how did Lord Yunsen die, maybe he was not killed by the eternal controller of our void region, but by the eternal controller of other heaven and earth. "

The border lord didn't continue, after all, this was just speculation, and it was useless to say.

Ye Tian didn't discuss this issue with the border lord for long, and quickly ended the topic.

The Frontier Lord learned about the situation after the Gray Mountains, and he didn't have much interest in the Origin Realm.

At present, the only benefit to him is the Colorful Golden Fruit, but in a short period of time, I am afraid that the sea of flowers will not give birth to the Colorful Golden Fruit.

As a result, he didn't pay much attention to the beginning.

Only Ye Tian was still waiting silently in the Rising Realm.

Time flies, and thousands of eternal epochs have passed.

During this period, Ye Tian also went through many attempts, entered the gray mountain range again and again, and withstood the attacks of black qi, and gradually understood a lot about black qi, but it was not of much use......... ，

However, after Ye Tian's will was improved, the speed at which he created the space-time supreme technique was much faster.

And.

Ye Tian also often entered the Dao Domain Tower to fight, and often provoked the big tree to the death, using the big tree to sharpen his own space-time supreme skills, so he created several space-time supreme skills.

Moreover, Ye Tian controlled some more Dao, and the number of Dao under his control was already approaching 200.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian was already infinitely close to the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the fourth level, but if the time and space could not be fused to the peak realm, he would not be able to completely step into the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord realm.

And if you want to reach the pinnacle of space-time fusion, the power of the whole body is transformed into the power of space-time control, which is not a simple matter.

this day.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies sat cross-legged in front of the Gray Mountains as usual, practicing silently, while the other replica body explored in the Gray Mountains.

Abrupt.

A huge amount of black gas filled the Gray Mountains. This is not the usual situation at all.

Obviously, this is something wrong with the black river.

So, Ye Tian immediately accelerated, wanting to enter the black river in a suicidal way to take a look.

Although if you do this, the replica body will definitely die, but at least you can perceive the situation of the black river.

I saw that Ye Tian's copy body instantly crashed into the black long river, and 3.0 then his body and will collapsed.

However, in the moment of collapse, he perceived a picture.

In this picture, an unknown giant creature stands on top of the black river, and no matter how black the water in the black river seems to hit its body, it can't affect it in the slightest.

And such a terrifying creature is using its claws to bombard a void, and this void corresponds to the Gray Mountain Range.

But Ye Tian didn't feel the attack, which meant that the creature didn't pose any danger to the seal here.

But the strength of the other party is absolutely terrifying, countless times stronger than him.

Immediately.

Ye Tian once again entered the black long river with a copy body, but this time he didn't go to see the excitement, but wanted to see if the other party had any talent, if he had a talent beyond the legendary ancestral endowment, maybe he could copy it!_
